name: First custom suite: subscription support copilot
description: An end-to-end starter suite showing how a small team can turn support policy into a Sentinel release gate.

cases.name: Safe credit and review wording emits
references: Cancellation credits under 40 GBP may be approved by support staff.
Cancellation credits of 40 GBP or more require manager review.
